# core.geoseries.GeoSeries { #ammonyte.core.geoseries.GeoSeries }

```python
core.geoseries.GeoSeries()
```

Ammonyte GeoSeries object for geographically referenced time series.

Child of both ammonyte.Series and pyleoclim.GeoSeries. Inherits all
Ammonyte transition detection methods (kstest, ruptures, embed, determinism,
laminarity) from ammonyte.Series, and all geospatial methods (map, dashboard)
and metadata (lat, lon, elevation, archiveType) from pyleoclim.GeoSeries.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**time**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`) or [numpy](`numpy`).[array](`numpy.array`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Independent variable (t).

<code>[**value**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`) or [numpy](`numpy`).[array](`numpy.array`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Values of the dependent variable (y).

<code>[**lat**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Latitude N in decimal degrees. Must be in the range [-90, +90].

<code>[**lon**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Longitude East in decimal degrees. Must be in the range [-180, +360].

<code>[**elevation**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Elevation in meters above sea level. Negative values indicate depth below global mean sea level.

<code>[**time_unit**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Units for the time vector (e.g., 'years', 'kyr BP').

<code>[**time_name**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Name of the time vector (e.g., 'Age', 'Time').

<code>[**value_name**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Name of the value vector (e.g., 'temperature', 'δ¹⁸O').

<code>[**value_unit**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Units for the value vector (e.g., 'deg C', '‰').

<code>[**label**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Name of the time series (e.g., 'NGRIP Ice Core').

<code>[**archiveType**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Climate archive type (e.g., 'GlacierIce', 'MarineSediment', 'Speleothem', 'LakeSediment').

## See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also}

ammonyte.Series : Ammonyte series without geolocation.
pyleoclim.GeoSeries : Pyleoclim GeoSeries with full geospatial API.

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

Create a GeoSeries from the NGRIP ice core record:

```python
>>> import os, ammonyte as amt
>>> ngrip = amt.Series.from_csv(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(amt.__file__), 'data', 'NGRIP.csv'))
>>> ngrip_geo = amt.GeoSeries(
...     time=ngrip.time,
...     value=ngrip.value,
...     lat=75.1,
...     lon=-42.32,
...     time_name=ngrip.time_name,
...     time_unit=ngrip.time_unit,
...     value_name=ngrip.value_name,
...     value_unit=ngrip.value_unit,
...     label=ngrip.label,
...     archiveType='GlacierIce'
... )
```
